articles.title: Olivia Rodrigo's New Song Sends a 1980s Band Back to the Charts!
articles.summary: Olivia Rodrigo's new single 'drop dead' hit No. 1, and a lyric about The Cure's 'Just Like Heaven' made their old hits album return to the chart at No. 93. Even a tiny shout-out can give a classic band a big boost!

articles.title: Sinner Zooms Toward a Tennis Record — and He's Only 24!
articles.summary: Jannik Sinner beat Arthur Fils to reach the Madrid Open final. If he wins, he'll be the first man to grab five Masters 1000 titles in a row, breaking a record held by Djokovic and Nadal. He's already won 22 matches straight!

articles.title: A Computer Just Found 10,000 Hidden Planets — and One Is a 'Hot Jupiter'!
articles.summary: Scientists used a smart computer program to spot over 10,000 possible new planets in old space data. If they're all real, we'd triple the number of known worlds! One, a 'hot Jupiter,' was already confirmed using a giant telescope.
